chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 77 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.3333/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on MA No.3334/2024 (Limitation) 4. For hearing of main case 15.10.2024 None has appeared on behalf of the appellant nor any intimation is received. It reflects from the impugned judgment which was rendered on 28.12.2023 by learned Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Sobhodero; however, this Appeal was preferred in the month of June, 2024 and an application under Section 5 of the Limitation Act was also filed. No reasonable ground is assigned for condoning the delay in filing the appeal even otherwise the Limitation Act is not applicable in the Appeals against acquittal. Resultantly, the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal being time barred is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
